title: Molecular Phylogenetics and the Perennial Problem of Homology.
author_string: Inkpen, S Andrew, Doolittle, W Ford
abstract: The concept of homology has a long history, during much of which the issue has been how to reconcile similarity and common descent when these are not coextensive. Although thinking molecular phylogeneticists have learned not to say "percent homology," the problems are deeper than that and unresolved.
